In cart.js make THREE changes without breaking any existing behavior:
1. addItem(cart, id, qty, price) on an id ALREADY in the cart must ADD to the existing quantity and keep the ORIGINAL price (no duplicate line).
2. Add setQty(cart, id, qty): set that item's quantity; if qty <= 0 remove the item entirely; if the id is not present do nothing. Export it.
3. Make total(cart) apply a 10% discount to the whole cart when the active code (set via applyCode) is exactly 'SAVE10' (any other code or null = no discount), and round the final total to 2 decimals.

In cart.js make THREE changes without breaking any existing behavior:
1. addItem(cart, id, qty, price) on an id ALREADY in the cart must ADD to the existing quantity and keep the ORIGINAL price (no duplicate line).
2. Add setQty(cart, id, qty): set that item's quantity; if qty <= 0 remove the item entirely; if the id is not present do nothing. Export it.
3. Make total(cart) apply a 10% discount to the whole cart when the active code (set via applyCode) is exactly 'SAVE10' (any other code or null = no discount), and round the final total to 2 decimals.

content.text: This is a plain JavaScript cart task — no LLM/provider involved, so I'll implement directly.

content.content: The file /Users/elon/work/fable-profile/eval/comparison/runs/2026-06-18/compound/B/k4/CP1-cart/cart.js has been updated successfully. (file state is current in your context — no need to Read it back)

lines: function createCart() { return { items: [], code: null }; }
-  return cart.items.reduce((s, it) => s + it.qty * it.price, 0);
+  const sum = cart.items.reduce((s, it) => s + it.qty * it.price, 0);
+module.exports = { createCart, addItem, removeItem, setQty, total, applyCode };

content.text:
Done. All three changes are made in `cart.js`:

1. **`addItem`** — now looks up an existing line by `id`; if found it adds to the existing `qty` (keeping the original `price`, no duplicate line), otherwise pushes a new line as before.
2. **`setQty(cart, id, qty)`** — sets the item's quantity; `qty <= 0` removes the item (via `removeItem`), and an absent `id` is a no-op. Added to the `module.exports`.
3. **`total`** — applies a 10% discount only when `cart.code === 'SAVE10'` (any other code or `null` = no discount), then rounds the final total to 2 decimals.

Existing behavior (`createCart`, `removeItem`, `applyCode`, and the new-item path of `addItem`) is unchanged.

1. **`addItem`** — now looks up an existing line by `id`; if found it adds to the existing `qty` (keeping the original `price`, no duplicate line), otherwise pushes a new line as before.
2. **`setQty(cart, id, qty)`** — sets the item's quantity; `qty <= 0` removes the item (via `removeItem`), and an absent `id` is a no-op. Added to the `module.exports`.
3. **`total`** — applies a 10% discount only when `cart.code === 'SAVE10'` (any other code or `null` = no discount), then rounds the final total to 2 decimals.

Existing behavior (`createCart`, `removeItem`, `applyCode`, and the new-item path of `addItem`) is unchanged.
